title: Section 1
content: This Act may be called the Preference Shares (Regulation of Dividends) Act, 1960. (2) It extends to the whole of India: Provided that it shall not apply to the State of Jammu and Kashmir* except to the extend to which the provision of this Act relate to the regulation of dividends on preference shares of banking and insurance companies and financial corporations. 1[(3) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (2) the provision of this Act shall, in their application to the Union territory of Pondicherry, have effect subject to the modifications specified in the Schedule.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 26 of 1968, s. 3 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 24-5-1968). *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
